ham.subject: Company Leave Policy Update – Effective May 1, 2024
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Please review the updated leave policy attached to this email. We have revised accrual rates and simplified the application process. The changes will take effect from 1 May 2024. If you have any questions, please contact the HR department.

Thank you,
HR Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

Our payroll system has detected a discrepancy with your account details. To avoid a delay in your upcoming salary, please verify your information by clicking the link below. Failure to act may result in a temporary suspension of your payroll until the issue is resolved.

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

John Smith
HR Manager
